title: COSCO India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: COSCO India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Warehouse Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
